createIntro.title: Assemble the candidate packet before you send the interview link.
createIntro.lead: Capture the role, choose only the questions that matter, and keep the decision criteria explicit before the recording session starts.

actions.cancelDescription: The candidate link will stop working. This cannot be undone.

edit.title: Edit interview
edit.answersBlockEditNotice: Editing is disabled after answers have been uploaded, because answers are tied to question order.
edit.discardDescription: Your edits to this interview will be lost.

candidateFeedback.title: Review and edit candidate-facing feedback
candidateFeedback.shellLead: This workspace is separate from scoring and evaluation. Generated suggestions and manual edits will appear here.
candidateFeedback.emptyDescription: Generate AI feedback for the entire interview or start with individual questions below.
candidateFeedback.notGeneratedHint: AI feedback for this block has not been generated yet.
candidateFeedback.generatingHint: AI feedback is being generated for this block.
candidateFeedback.failedDescription: This block could not be generated. Try generating it again.
candidateFeedback.suggestionLead: Review the AI suggestion below. Accept it to lock the text for candidate-facing feedback.
candidateFeedback.noQuestionsDescription: This interview has no questions, so there is no per-question feedback to edit.

liveRefresh.title: Live updates paused
liveRefresh.description: We stopped polling generation status after repeated failures or a timeout.
